---
title: "workflow"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-15"
---


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
library(reshape)
ftir_pigmenti <- read_excel("ftir_pigmenti_rev_2.xlsx")
d <- as_tibble(ftir_pigmenti) |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "nume_rand") |> 
  column_to_rownames(var = "Nume") |> 
  mutate_if(is.character, as.factor)
  

```

#EDA 
d["mineral",] <- d |> if_else(colname == c(starts_with(725:726, 728, 878:879. 881:883, )), "Mineral", as.character(NA)) |> as.factor()

```{r}
library(factoextra)
library(FactoMineR)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(writexl)

X <- PCA(d[,-c(1:6)], scale.unit = TRUE, graph = T)

pca_res <- X$ind$coord |> as.data.frame() |> 
  as_tibble() |>
  rownames_to_column(var = "nume_rand")

d <- d %>% 
full_join(pca_res)

ocru_galben <-  list(725:726, 728, 878:879, 881:883) |> as.character()

 d_long <- d |> pivot_longer(cols = where(is.numeric), names_to = "Names", values_to = "Values") |>   mutate(Mineral = case_when(
    Names == c(3401.99359999999, 3400.70789999999, 3399.42220000000, 890.99830000000,889.71260000000,631.28450000000, 629.99880000000,628.71310000000) ~ "Ocru galben",
                             Names == c(1420.7116000000000, 1419.4259000000000, 1418.1402000000000, 1416.8544999999900, 1415.5688000000000, 1414.2831000000000, 1412.9974000000000, 1411.7116000000000, 1410.4259000000000, 874.2840999999990, 872.9983999999990, 871.7127000000000, 712.2844000000000, 710.9986999999990, 709.7129999999990) ~ "Alb de calcit",
                             Names == c(725.1414999999990, 726.4271999999990, 727.7128999999990, 878.1412000000000, 879.4269000000000, 880.7125999999990, 881.9982999999990, 883.2840999999990, 1429.7116000000000, 1430.9973000000000, 1432.2829999999900, 1433.5687000000000, 1434.8544999999900, 1436.1402000000000, 1437.4259000000000, 1438.7116000000000, 1439.9973000000000, 1441.2829999999900, 1442.5687000000000, 1443.8543999999900, 1445.1401000000000, 1446.4259000000000) ~ "Dolomit",
                             Names == c(659.5702000000000, 660.8559000000000, 662.1416000000000, 663.4272999999990, 664.7129999999990, 665.9987999999990, 667.2844999999990, 668.5702000000000, 669.8559000000000, 671.1416000000000, 1109.5693000000000, 1110.8551000000000, 1112.1407999999900, 1113.4265000000000, 1114.7121999999900, 1115.9979000000000, 1117.2836000000000, 1118.5693000000000, 1119.8550000000000, 1121.1407999999900, 1122.4265000000000, 1123.7121999999900, 1124.9979000000000, 1126.2836000000000, 1127.5693000000000, 1128.8550000000000, 1130.1406999999900, 1131.4264000000000, 1132.7121999999900, 1133.9979000000000, 1135.2836000000000, 1136.5693000000000, 1137.8550000000000, 1139.1406999999900, 1140.4264000000000, 1141.7121000000000, 1142.9979000000000, 1144.2836000000000, 1145.5693000000000, 1618.7112999999900, 1619.9970000000000, 1621.2827000000000, 1622.5684000000000, 1623.8541000000000, 1625.1397999999900, 1626.4255000000000, 1627.7112000000000, 1628.9969000000000, 1630.2827000000000, 1631.5684000000000, 1632.8541000000000, 1634.1397999999900, 1635.4255000000000, 1636.7112000000000, 1637.9969000000000, 1639.2826000000000, 1640.5684000000000, 1641.8541000000000, 1643.1397999999900, 1644.4255000000000, 1645.7112000000000, 1646.9969000000000, 1648.2826000000000, 1649.5682999999900, 1650.8540000000000, 1652.1397999999900, 1653.4255000000000, 1654.7112000000000, 1655.9969000000000, 1657.2826000000000, 1658.5682999999900, 1659.8540000000000, 1661.1396999999900, 1662.4255000000000, 1663.7112000000000, 1664.9969000000000, 1666.2826000000000, 1667.5682999999900, 1668.8540000000000, 1670.1396999999900, 1671.4254000000000, 1672.7111000000000, 1673.9969000000000, 1675.2826000000000, 1676.5682999999900, 1677.8540000000000, 1679.1396999999900, 1680.4254000000000, 1681.7111000000000, 1682.9967999999900, 1684.2826000000000, 1685.5682999999900, 1686.8540000000000, 3399.4222000000000, 3400.7078999999900, 3401.9935999999900) ~ "Gips",
    Names == c(3403.2793000000000, 3404.5650000000000, 3405.8508000000000, 3407.1365000000000, 3408.4222000000000, 3409.7078999999900, 3410.9935999999900, 3412.2793000000000, 3413.5650000000000, 3414.8507000000000, 3416.1365000000000, 3417.4222000000000, 3418.7078999999900, 3419.9935999999900, 3421.2793000000000, 3422.5650000000000, 3423.8507000000000, 3425.1363999999900, 3426.4220999999900, 3427.7078999999900, 3428.9935999999900, 3430.2793000000000, 3431.5650000000000, 3432.8507000000000, 3434.1363999999900, 3435.4220999999900, 3436.7078000000000, 3437.9935999999900, 3439.2793000000000, 3440.5650000000000, 3441.8507000000000, 3443.1363999999900, 3444.4220999999900, 3445.7078000000000, 3446.9935000000000, 3448.2791999999900, 3449.5650000000000, 3450.8507000000000, 3452.1363999999900, 3453.4220999999900, 3454.7078000000000, 3455.9935000000000, 3457.2791999999900, 3458.5648999999900, 3459.8507000000000, 3461.1363999999900, 3462.4220999999900, 3463.7078000000000, 3464.9935000000000, 3466.2791999999900, 3467.5648999999900, 3468.8506000000000, 3470.1363000000000, 3471.4220999999900, 3472.7078000000000, 3473.9935000000000, 3475.2791999999900, 3476.5648999999900, 3477.8506000000000, 3479.1363000000000, 3480.4220000000000, 3481.7078000000000, 3482.9935000000000, 3484.2791999999900, 3485.5648999999900, 3486.8506000000000, 3488.1363000000000, 3489.4220000000000, 3490.7076999999900, 3491.9935000000000, 3493.2791999999900, 3494.5648999999900, 3495.8506000000000, 3497.1363000000000, 3498.4220000000000, 3499.7076999999900, 3500.9933999999900, 3502.2791000000000, 3503.5648999999900, 3504.8506000000000, 3506.1363000000000, 3507.4220000000000, 3508.7076999999900, 3509.9933999999900, 3511.2791000000000, 3512.5648000000000, 3513.8506000000000, 3515.1363000000000, 3516.4220000000000, 3517.7076999999900, 3518.9933999999900, 3520.2791000000000, 3521.5648000000000, 3522.8505000000000, 3524.1361999999900, 3525.4220000000000, 3526.7076999999900, 3527.9933999999900, 3529.2791000000000, 3530.5648000000000, 3531.8505000000000, 3533.1361999999900, 3534.4218999999900, 3535.7076999999900, 3536.9933999999900, 3538.2791000000000, 3539.5648000000000, 3540.8505000000000) ~ "Gips",
    Names == c(1140.4264000000000, 1139.1406999999900, 1137.8550000000000, 1136.5693000000000, 1135.2836000000000, 1133.9979000000000, 1132.7121999999900, 1131.4264000000000, 1130.1406999999900, 1128.8550000000000, 1127.5693000000000, 1126.2836000000000, 1124.9979000000000, 1123.7121999999900, 1122.4265000000000, 1121.1407999999900, 1119.8550000000000) ~ "Anhidrit",
    Names == c(680.1416000000000, 678.8559000000000, 677.5702000000000, 676.2844000000000, 674.9986999999990, 673.7129999999990, 672.4272999999990, 671.1416000000000, 669.8559000000000, 668.5702000000000, 610.7131000000000, 609.4274000000000, 608.1417000000000, 606.8559999999990, 605.5702999999990, 604.2845999999990, 602.9989000000000, 601.7132000000000, 600.4274000000000) ~ "CaSO4",
    Names == c(3696.4216000000000, 3695.1359000000000, 3693.8501999999900, 3692.5645000000000, 3691.2788000000000, 3689.9931000000000, 3688.7073999999900, 3687.4216999999900, 3686.1359000000000, 3684.8501999999900, 3683.5645000000000, 3682.2788000000000, 3680.9931000000000, 3679.7073999999900, 3678.4216999999900, 3677.1360000000000, 3675.8501999999900, 3674.5645000000000, 3673.2788000000000, 3671.9931000000000, 3670.7073999999900, 3669.4216999999900, 3668.1360000000000, 3666.8503000000000, 3665.5646000000000, 3664.2788000000000, 3662.9931000000000, 3661.7073999999900, 3660.4216999999900, 3659.1360000000000, 3657.8503000000000, 3656.5646000000000, 3655.2788999999900, 3653.9931000000000, 3652.7073999999900, 3651.4216999999900, 3650.1360000000000, 3620.5646000000000, 3619.2788999999900, 3617.9931999999900, 3616.7075000000000, 3615.4218000000000, 3614.1361000000000, 1015.7124000000000, 1014.4267000000000, 1013.1410000000000, 1011.8552000000000, 1010.5694999999900, 1009.2838000000000, 1007.9981000000000, 1006.7124000000000, 1005.4267000000000, 1004.1410000000000, 1002.8553000000000, 1001.5696000000000, 1000.2838000000000, 915.4269000000000, 914.1411000000000, 912.8554000000000, 911.5697000000000) ~ "Argila alba",
    Names == c(3689.9931000000000, 3688.7073999999900, 3687.4216999999900, 3686.1359000000000, 3684.8501999999900, 3683.5645000000000, 3682.2788000000000, 3680.9931000000000, 3679.7073999999900, 3678.4216999999900, 3677.1360000000000, 3675.8501999999900, 3674.5645000000000, 3673.2788000000000, 3671.9931000000000, 3670.7073999999900, 3669.4216999999900, 3668.1360000000000, 3666.8503000000000, 3665.5646000000000, 3664.2788000000000, 3662.9931000000000, 3661.7073999999900, 3660.4216999999900, 3659.1360000000000, 3657.8503000000000, 3656.5646000000000, 3655.2788999999900, 3653.9931000000000, 3652.7073999999900, 3651.4216999999900, 3650.1360000000000, 3648.8503000000000, 3647.5646000000000, 3646.2788999999900, 3644.9931999999900, 3643.7075000000000, 3642.4216999999900, 3641.1360000000000, 3639.8503000000000, 3638.5646000000000, 3637.2788999999900, 3635.9931999999900, 3634.7075000000000, 3633.4218000000000, 3632.1360000000000, 3630.8503000000000, 3629.5646000000000, 3628.2788999999900, 3626.9931999999900, 3625.7075000000000, 3624.4218000000000, 3623.1361000000000, 3621.8503999999900, 3620.5646000000000, 3619.2788999999900, 1029.8552000000000, 1028.5695000000000, 1027.2837999999900, 1025.9981000000000, 1024.7123999999900, 1023.4267000000000, 1022.1409000000000, 1020.8552000000000, 1019.5694999999900, 1018.2838000000000, 1016.9981000000000, 1015.7124000000000, 1014.4267000000000, 1013.1410000000000, 1011.8552000000000, 1010.5694999999900, 1009.2838000000000, 1007.9981000000000, 1006.7124000000000, 1005.4267000000000, 1004.1410000000000, 1002.8553000000000, 1001.5696000000000, 1000.2838000000000, 915.4269000000000) ~ "Argila&Hematit",
    Names == c(650.5702000000000, 649.2844999999990, 647.9987999999990, 646.7131000000000, 645.4274000000000, 644.1416000000000, 642.8559000000000, 641.5702000000000, 640.2844999999990, 638.9987999999990, 637.7131000000000, 636.4274000000000, 635.1417000000000, 633.8559999999990, 632.5702000000000, 631.2844999999990, 629.9987999999990, 628.7131000000000, 627.4274000000000, 626.1417000000000, 624.8559999999990, 623.5702999999990, 622.2844999999990, 620.9987999999990, 619.71310000000000, 1004.1410000000000, 1002.8553000000000, 1001.5696000000000, 1000.2838000000000, 915.4269000000000) ~ "Oxizi de mangan",
    Names == c(3601.2790000000000, 3599.9931999999900, 3598.7075000000000, 3597.4218000000000, 3596.1361000000000, 3594.8503999999900, 3593.5646999999900, 3592.2790000000000, 3590.9933000000000, 3589.7076000000000, 3588.4218000000000, 3587.1361000000000, 3585.8503999999900, 3584.5646999999900, 3583.2790000000000, 3581.9933000000000, 3580.7076000000000, 3579.4218999999900, 3578.1361000000000, 3576.8503999999900, 3575.5646999999900, 3574.2790000000000, 3572.9933000000000, 3571.7076000000000, 3570.4218999999900, 3569.1361999999900, 3567.8505000000000, 3566.5646999999900, 3565.2790000000000, 3563.9933000000000, 3562.7076000000000, 3561.4218999999900, 3560.1361999999900, 3558.8505000000000, 3557.5648000000000, 3556.2790000000000, 3554.9933000000000, 3553.7076000000000, 3552.4218999999900, 3551.1361999999900, 3549.8505000000000, 3548.5648000000000, 3547.2791000000000, 3545.9933999999900, 3544.7076000000000, 3543.4218999999900, 3542.1361999999900, 3540.8505000000000, 3539.5648000000000, 3538.2791000000000, 3536.9933999999900, 3535.7076999999900, 3534.4218999999900, 3533.1361999999900, 3531.8505000000000, 3530.5648000000000, 3529.2791000000000, 3527.9933999999900, 3526.7076999999900, 3525.4220000000000, 3524.1361999999900, 3522.8505000000000, 3521.5648000000000, 3520.2791000000000, 3518.9933999999900, 3517.7076999999900, 3516.4220000000000, 3515.1363000000000, 3513.8506000000000, 3512.5648000000000, 3511.2791000000000, 3509.9933999999900, 3508.7076999999900, 3507.4220000000000, 3506.1363000000000, 3504.8506000000000, 3503.5648999999900, 3502.2791000000000, 3500.9933999999900, 3499.7076999999900, 3498.4220000000000, 3497.1363000000000, 3495.8506000000000, 3494.5648999999900, 3493.2791999999900, 3491.9935000000000, 3490.7076999999900, 3489.4220000000000, 3488.1363000000000, 3486.8506000000000, 3485.5648999999900, 3484.2791999999900, 3482.9935000000000, 3481.7078000000000, 3480.4220000000000, 3479.1363000000000, 3477.8506000000000, 3476.5648999999900, 3475.2791999999900, 3473.9935000000000, 3472.7078000000000, 3471.4220999999900, 3470.1363000000000, 3468.8506000000000) ~ "ArgilaFeMn",
    Names == c(3467.5648999999900, 3466.2791999999900, 3464.9935000000000, 3463.7078000000000, 3462.4220999999900, 3461.1363999999900, 3459.8507000000000, 3458.5648999999900, 3457.2791999999900, 3455.9935000000000, 3454.7078000000000, 3453.4220999999900, 3452.1363999999900, 3450.8507000000000, 3449.5650000000000, 3448.2791999999900, 3446.9935000000000, 3445.7078000000000, 3444.4220999999900, 3443.1363999999900, 3441.8507000000000, 3440.5650000000000, 3439.2793000000000, 3437.9935999999900, 3436.7078000000000, 3435.4220999999900, 3434.1363999999900, 3432.8507000000000, 3431.5650000000000, 3430.2793000000000, 3428.9935999999900, 3427.7078999999900, 3426.4220999999900, 3425.1363999999900, 3423.8507000000000, 3422.5650000000000, 3421.2793000000000, 3419.9935999999900, 3418.7078999999900, 3417.4222000000000, 3416.1365000000000, 3414.8507000000000, 3413.5650000000000, 3412.2793000000000, 3410.9935999999900, 3409.7078999999900, 3408.4222000000000, 3407.1365000000000, 3405.8508000000000, 3404.5650000000000, 3403.2793000000000, 3401.9935999999900, 3400.7078999999900, 3399.4222000000000, 3398.1365000000000, 3396.8508000000000, 3395.5650999999900, 3394.2793000000000, 3392.9935999999900, 3391.7078999999900, 3390.4222000000000, 3389.1365000000000, 3387.8508000000000, 3386.5650999999900, 3385.2793999999900, 3383.9937000000000, 3382.7078999999900, 3381.4222000000000, 3380.1365000000000, 3378.8508000000000, 3377.5650999999900, 3376.2793999999900, 3374.9937000000000, 3373.7080000000000, 3372.4222000000000, 3371.1365000000000, 3369.8508000000000, 3368.5650999999900, 3367.2793999999900, 3365.9937000000000, 3364.7080000000000, 3363.4223000000000, 3362.1365999999900, 3360.8508000000000, 3359.5650999999900, 3358.2793999999900, 3356.9937000000000, 3355.7080000000000, 3354.4223000000000, 3353.1365999999900, 3351.8508999999900, 3350.5650999999900, 3349.2793999999900, 3347.9937000000000, 3346.7080000000000, 3345.4223000000000, 3344.1365999999900, 3342.8508999999900, 3341.5652000000000, 3340.2795000000000, 3338.9937000000000, 3337.7080000000000, 3336.4223000000000, 3335.1365999999900, 3333.8508999999900, 3332.5652000000000, 3331.2795000000000, 3329.9938000000000, 3328.7080000000000, 3327.4223000000000, 3326.1365999999900, 3324.8508999999900, 3323.5652000000000, 3322.2795000000000, 3320.9938000000000, 3319.7080999999900, 3318.4223000000000, 3317.1365999999900, 3315.8508999999900, 3314.5652000000000, 3313.2795000000000) ~ "ArgilaFeMn",
     Names == c(3311.9938000000000, 3310.7080999999900, 3309.4223999999900, 3308.1367000000000, 3306.8508999999900, 3305.5652000000000, 3304.2795000000000, 3302.9938000000000, 3301.7080999999900, 3300.4223999999900, 3299.1367000000000, 3297.8510000000000, 3296.5652000000000, 3295.2795000000000, 3293.9938000000000, 3292.7080999999900, 3291.4223999999900, 3290.1367000000000, 3288.8510000000000, 3287.5653000000000, 3286.2795999999900, 3284.9938000000000, 3283.7080999999900, 3282.4223999999900, 3281.1367000000000, 3279.8510000000000, 3278.5653000000000, 3277.2795999999900, 3275.9938999999900, 3274.7080999999900, 3273.4223999999900, 3272.1367000000000, 3270.8510000000000, 3269.5653000000000, 3268.2795999999900, 3266.9938999999900, 3265.7082000000000, 3264.4225000000000, 3263.1367000000000, 3261.8510000000000, 3260.5653000000000, 3259.2795999999900, 3257.9938999999900, 3256.7082000000000, 3255.4225000000000, 3254.1368000000000, 3252.8510000000000, 3251.5653000000000, 3250.2795999999900, 3248.9938999999900, 3247.7082000000000, 3246.4225000000000, 3245.1368000000000, 3243.8510999999900, 3242.5653000000000, 3241.2795999999900, 3239.9938999999900, 3238.7082000000000, 3237.4225000000000, 3236.1368000000000, 3234.8510999999900, 3233.5654000000000, 3232.2797000000000, 3230.9938999999900, 3229.7082000000000, 3228.4225000000000, 3227.1368000000000, 3225.8510999999900, 3224.5654000000000, 3223.2797000000000, 3221.9940000000000, 3220.7082000000000, 3219.4225000000000, 3218.1368000000000, 3216.8510999999900, 3215.5654000000000, 3214.2797000000000, 3212.9940000000000, 3211.7082999999900, 3210.4225999999900, 3209.1368000000000, 3207.8510999999900, 3206.5654000000000, 3205.2797000000000, 3203.9940000000000, 3202.7082999999900, 3201.4225999999900, 3200.1369000000000, 1029.8552000000000, 1028.5695000000000, 1027.2837999999900, 1025.9981000000000, 1024.7123999999900, 1023.4267000000000, 1022.1409000000000, 1020.8552000000000, 1019.5694999999900, 1018.2838000000000, 1016.9981000000000, 1015.7124000000000, 1014.4267000000000, 1013.1410000000000, 1011.8552000000000, 1010.5694999999900, 1009.2838000000000, 1007.9981000000000, 1006.7124000000000, 1005.4267000000000, 1004.1410000000000, 1002.8553000000000, 1001.5696000000000, 1000.2838000000000, 650.5702000000000, 649.2844999999990, 647.9987999999990, 646.7131000000000, 645.4274000000000, 644.1416000000000, 642.8559000000000, 641.5702000000000, 640.2844999999990, 638.9987999999990, 637.7131000000000, 636.4274000000000, 635.1417000000000, 633.8559999999990, 632.5702000000000, 631.2844999999990, 629.9987999999990, 628.7131000000000, 627.4274000000000, 626.1417000000000, 624.8559999999990, 623.5702999999990, 622.2844999999990, 620.9987999999990, 619.7131000000000, 618.4274000000000, 617.1417000000000, 615.8559999999990, 614.5702999999990, 613.2845999999990, 611.9989000000000, 610.7131000000000, 609.4274000000000, 608.1417000000000, 606.8559999999990, 605.5702999999990, 604.2845999999990, 602.9989000000000, 601.7132000000000, 600.4274000000000, 599.1417000000000) ~ "ArgilaFeMn",
    Names == c(3403.2793000000000, 3401.9935999999900, 3400.7078999999900, 3399.4222000000000, 3398.1365000000000, 3396.8508000000000, 1682.9967999999900, 1681.7111000000000, 1680.4254000000000, 1679.1396999999900, 1677.8540000000000, 1100.5694000000000, 1099.2837000000000, 1097.9979000000000, 1096.7121999999900, 1095.4265000000000, 1094.1407999999900, 1092.8551000000000, 1091.5694000000000, 1090.2837000000000, 1088.9980000000000, 1087.7121999999900, 1086.4265000000000, 1085.1407999999900, 1083.8551000000000, 1082.5694000000000, 1081.2837000000000, 1079.9980000000000, 1078.7122999999900, 1077.4266000000000, 1076.1407999999900, 1074.8551000000000, 1073.5694000000000, 1072.2837000000000, 1070.9980000000000, 1069.7122999999900, 1068.4266000000000, 1067.1409000000000, 1065.8551000000000, 1064.5694000000000, 1063.2837000000000, 1061.9980000000000, 1060.7122999999900, 1059.4266000000000, 1058.1409000000000, 1056.8552000000000, 1055.5694000000000, 1054.2837000000000, 1052.9980000000000, 1051.7122999999900, 1050.4266000000000, 1049.1409000000000, 1047.8552000000000, 1046.5695000000000, 1045.2837999999900, 1043.9980000000000, 1042.7122999999900, 1041.4266000000000, 1040.1409000000000, 1038.8552000000000, 1037.5695000000000, 1036.2837999999900, 1034.9981000000000, 1033.7122999999900, 1032.4266000000000, 1031.1409000000000, 1029.8552000000000, 1028.5695000000000, 620.9987999999990, 619.7131000000000, 618.4274000000000, 617.1417000000000, 615.8559999999990, 614.5702999999990, 613.2845999999990, 611.9989000000000, 610.7131000000000, 609.4274000000000, 608.1417000000000, 606.8559999999990, 605.5702999999990, 604.2845999999990, 602.9989000000000, 601.7132000000000, 600.4274000000000) ~ "Scumming",
    )
)

```


```{r}
d <- d |> pivot_longer(cols = where(is.numeric), names_to = "Names", values_to = "Values") |> 
  mutate(Mineral = if_else(Names == c(3401.99359999999, 3400.70789999999, 3399.42220000000, 890.99830000000,889.71260000000,631.28450000000, 629.99880000000,628.71310000000), "Ocru galben", as.character(NA)
  )) |> 
  mutate(Mineral = if_else(Names == c(1420.711600000000,1419.425900000000, 1418.140200000000, 1416.854499999990, 1415.568800000000, 1414.283100000000, 1412.997400000000, 1411.711600000000, 1410.425900000000, 874.284099999999, 872.998399999999, 871.712700000000, 712.284400000000, 710.998699999999, 709.712999999999), "Alb de calcit", as.character(NA)
  ))

```


```{r}
write_xlsx(d, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/ftir_date_full_cu_PCA.xlsx")
```


```{r}
d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Lustru)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = Angoba), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = Color), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


d %>% filter(Color == "rosu") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1) +
  ggtitle("PCA rosu") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "alb") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA alb") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "negru") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA negru") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "blank") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Sursa)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA blank") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa == "Luturi") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA luturi") +
   scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa == "Placute") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA Placute") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


```

```{r}
pca_var_contrib <- get_pca_var(X)$contrib |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_1.xlsx")

Dim.1 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 150)
 
Dim.1 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 150)

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_2.xlsx")

 
Dim.2 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")


  

```

```{r}
library(writexl)

pca_var_cor <- get_pca_var(X)$cor |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()
write_xlsx(pca_var_cor, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/corelatii_dim_1si2.xlsx")



Dim.1.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 75), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.1, n = 75)
  ) 
 

Dim.1.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 75), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.2, n = 75)
  ) 
 
Dim.2.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")

```
